scripts.dev:web: concurrently -k -n convex,web -c green,blue "bun run --cwd packages/convex dev" "bun run --cwd apps/web dev"
scripts.install:all: bun run install:web && bun run install:shared && bun run install:convex
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd apps/web lint && bun run --cwd packages/shared lint && bun run --cwd packages/convex lint
scripts.test: bun run --cwd apps/web test && bun run --cwd packages/shared test && bun run --cwd packages/convex test
scripts.coverage: bun run --cwd apps/web coverage && bun run --cwd packages/shared coverage && bun run --cwd packages/convex coverage
scripts.typecheck: bun run --cwd apps/web typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/shared typecheck && bun run --cwd packages/convex typecheck
scripts.health: bun run env:check && bun run --cwd apps/web health && bun run --cwd packages/shared health && bun run --cwd packages/convex health
scripts.health:web: bun run env:check && bun run --cwd apps/web health
scripts.health:shared: bun run env:check && bun run --cwd packages/shared health
scripts.health:convex: bun run env:check && bun run --cwd packages/convex health
